title: Lead SEO Specialist at Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd!
